name: Gumbo I
recipeIngredient: Hot red pepper & cayenne to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine the okra, garlic, tomato paste, stewed tomatoes, onion, bay leaf, and water.
2. Cook slowly until the ingredients are tender.
3. Brown the flour in a separate pan.
4. Gradually add the browned flour to the pot with the okra mixture, stirring constantly.
5. Add enough water to form a roux.
6. Incorporate the shrimp and crabs into the pot.
7. Season to taste with hot red pepper and cayenne pepper.
8. Cook slowly until everything is well combined and heated through.
